name: Glima AI
description: Glima AI is an all-in-one AI creative platform for generating, editing, and enhancing images and videos using advanced artificial intelligence models.

name: How to Create Airbnb-Style Icons with Glima AI
description: Follow these simple steps to generate professional Airbnb-style icons using Glima AI’s online image generator.

step.name: Describe Your Icon Idea
step.text: Enter your concept, such as a cozy cabin, beach umbrella, or mountain trail. Be as specific or creative as you like.

step.name: Select Your Style Preferences
step.text: Choose the Airbnb-style aesthetic—soft curves, minimal lines, or pastel color schemes. Let the AI match the iconic look.

step.name: Generate & Download
step.text: With one click, your unique Airbnb-style icon is ready to use for listings, apps, or branding. Download in high-res formats.
